name: [1/1CL] Public Operations Group
description: Public Operations Group started as an organised force of random players. It grew into a large fighting force in Charlie Shard before helping to form the 1CL with TCS. P.O.G focuses on many things and shifts its focus every war to keep things fresh. We currently focus on naval warfare and marine beach invasions.

name: [2/1CL] The Colonial Shadows
description: TCS is a Reconnaissance and Partisan-focused regiment, specializing in Spec-Ops and deep backline operations.

name: [3/1CL] 33rd Field Artillery Corps
description: The 33rd is an Artillery Corps who's foundation is on making the wardens fear the big guns and rockets. We always roll nat 20s on destruction, and will always answer the chance to blow things up.

name: [4/1CL] The Ultramarines
description: [ULTRA] is a Foxhole regiment modeled after the Ultramarines Chapter of Warhammer 40,000, organized according to the Codex Astartes with clear chains of command and a true combined-arms doctrine. We prioritize logistics, communication, and coordination over individual play, not as an aesthetic choice, but as our operational philosophy.

name: [5/1CL] War Machine
description: WM specializes in manufacturing and driving tanks or other vehicles. We also have an unhealthy addiction to facilities.

name: [C/1CL] Colonial Air Team
description: The Colonial Air Team is a regiment of focused backline facility managers and precise logistics enjoyers with a veteran mix of high-end naval, armour, and air combat. Featuring a rock-solid command structure, optimized systems integration, and proven super-heavy production capacity, we just need dedicated players to help us deliver the firepower!

name: [E/1CL] Eternal Coastal Division
description: A naval and engineering focused regiment on the Colonial side, we seek to expand the glorious Colonial Fleet with large and medium ships, constant fleet operations and patrols, and build strong and reliable FOBs for the frontline. Join us today!

name: [I/1CL] 1st Trash Panda Regiment
description: 1TPR is an elite intelligence and special operations unit dedicated to serving the Mesean Republic and its interests. We specialize in reconnaissance and sabotage missions, both close to the front and deep behind enemy lines. We use combined-arms tactics, employing light aircraft, watercraft and ground vehicles along with infantry to conduct reconnaissance, area denial, sabotage and other missions. We are no strangers to being surrounded, and death is treated more as an eventuality in our ranks, not just a risk.
